---
title: "Meta-analysis Manuscript Title"
author:
  - name: "Author Name"
    affiliations:
      - name: "Institution"
        department: "Department"
    orcid: "0000-0000-0000-0000"
    corresponding: true
    email: "author@example.com"
date: last-modified
abstract: |
  Background: ...
  Methods: ...
  Results: ...
  Conclusions: ...
keywords: [meta-analysis, systematic review]
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
    embed-resources: true
  docx:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
  typst:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    columns: 1
    margin:
      x: 1in
      y: 1in
    papersize: us-letter
    mainfont: "New Computer Modern"
    fontsize: 11pt
bibliography: references.bib
csl: style.csl
---

{{< include 00_abstract.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}

{{< include 01_introduction.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}

{{< include 02_methods.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}

{{< include 03_results.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}

{{< include 04_discussion.qmd >}}

{{< include tables.qmd >}}

{{< include figures_legends.qmd >}}

# References {.unnumbered}

::: {#refs}
:::
